name: cnm-mk-hb
description: E-commerce system for computers and accessories with AI customer support module

scripts.db:up: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.db:down: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down || docker-compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down
